positioning.product: Premium white-label ecommerce AI agent platform
positioning.market: agencies, ecommerce operators, consultants, and businesses wanting governed AI execution
positioning.core_offer: A governed AI workforce for ecommerce growth, content, customer support, operations, analytics, billing, and automation.
differentiators: client portal with active paid agents only

packages.starter: Entry package for small ecommerce brands needing focused AI help.
packages.growth: Multi-agent growth package for active ecommerce operations.
packages.pro: Advanced package for higher-volume brands and agencies.
packages.manual_unlimited: Admin-deployed unlimited-credit account for demos, VIPs, or custom clients.

sales_page_sections: Hero: Deploy a governed ecommerce AI workforce for your business or clients.
Problem: Ecommerce teams need content, ads, product pages, support, analytics, and automation without hiring a full team.
Solution: 25 specialised ecommerce AI agents working through a secure portal.
Proof: Billing, governance, client activation, admin controls, and operational recovery are built in.
CTA: Book a demo or request access.
demo_script: Deploy a client with unlimited credits.
launch_checklist: Connect live provider key only after approval.
